title: tylophora guillauminiana
intro: Tylophora guillauminiana is a perennial vine species native to New Caledonia, belonging to the family Asclepiadaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimalarial compounds. The health benefits of Tylophora guillauminiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Tylophora guillauminiana typically involve the leaves or roots being made into infusions or decoctions for medicinal use.
